ddls:
CREATE TABLE "protein_structures" (
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein structure */,
  "lab" INTEGER /* ID of the lab that analyzed the protein */,
  "num" INTEGER /* Identifier number for the protein */,
  "rmsd" REAL /* Root Mean Square Deviation value */,
  "di_all" REAL /* Distance Index value for all atoms */,
  "inf_all" REAL /* Interface Index value for all atoms */,
  "inf_wc" REAL /* Interface Index value for water capped atoms */,
  "inf_nwc" REAL /* Interface Index value for non-water capped atoms */,
  "inf_stacking" REAL /* Interface Index value for stacking interactions */,
  "clash_score" REAL /* Clash Score value */,
  "p_value" INTEGER /* P-value indicating the significance of the structure */,
  "mcq" REAL /* MCQ value (Molecular Characterization of Proteins) */,
  "tm_score" REAL /* TM-score for structural similarity */,
  "best_sol" INTEGER /* Identifier for the best solution */,
  "detail" TEXT /* Additional details about the protein structure */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the protein is derived */,
  "experiments" TEXT /* Types of experiments conducted */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication where the structure was first reported */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure was created or first analyzed */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the structure was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the structure (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_structures_lab FOREIGN KEY ("lab") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the lab */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lab */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the lab was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the lab's website */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Main research focus of the lab */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_by FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the protein structure */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version update */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("structure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDB, CIF) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the protein structure file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., PDB, CIF) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the file has been accessed */,
  "last_access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_files_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("structure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "structure_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein structure being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein structure */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein structure was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the structure */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_structure_id FOREIGN KEY ("structure_id") REFERENCES protein_structures ("structure_id")
)
